input.input: Generate the daily support queue digest for today. Remind the team to: check all open tickets, prioritize high/critical items, follow up on tickets open >48 hours, review escalations with senior staff, and update all in-progress tickets with status notes.
input.prompt: You are a support operations manager. Generate a concise daily morning briefing report for the support team. Format it as a clear, actionable digest with sections: 1) OPEN TICKETS summary, 2) HIGH PRIORITY items needing immediate attention, 3) ESCALATIONS requiring senior review, 4) RECOMMENDATIONS for the day. Use a professional but energizing tone to motivate the team.

actions.name: b1c2d3e4-0002-0000-0000-000000000001
actions.displayName: Create Daily Digest Task in Tickets

input.input: Daily escalation reminder for senior support team
input.prompt: Generate a brief escalation reminder message for the senior support team. Remind them to: 1) Review all active escalations in the Escalations project, 2) Ensure critical items have owner assignments, 3) Update customers with status within 2 hours, 4) Document resolution steps for future reference. Keep it professional and urgent but not alarming.
